mapper.sql: user_id, puzzle_date, puzzle_id, status, attempt_count, best_moves_to_win, last_attempt_moves_json, solved_at, hint_used, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_daily_puzzle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND puzzle_date = #{puzzleDate} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM user_daily_puzzle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND puzzle_date = #{puzzleDate} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_daily_puzzle (user_id, puzzle_date, puzzle_id, status, attempt_count, hint_used) VALUES (#{userId}, #{puzzleDate}, #{puzzleId}, #{status}, #{attemptCount}, #{hintUsed})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_daily_puzzle SET status = #{status}, attempt_count = #{attemptCount}, best_moves_to_win = #{bestMovesToWin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_attempt_moves_json = #{lastAttemptMovesJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, solved_at = #{solvedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND puzzle_date = #{puzzleDate}
UPDATE user_daily_puzzle SET hint_used = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND puzzle_date = #{puzzleDate}
